title: EV tech is trickling down to hybrid and combustion vehicles, and I’m here for it
summary: What happens when you extend SDVs beyond EVs to hybrid and combustion vehicles? Manufacturers like Hyundai Motor Group are launching more affordable hybrid and combustion vehicles that are SDVs.
